prompt: I'm creating homework assignments for my course and need to set up the front matter consistently. Each assignment needs: title, difficulty level (beginner/intermediate/advanced), related agents (memory, reasoning, planning), C++ topics covered, and a due date. Also, I want to attach PDFs and code files to assignments. How should I structure this with Hugo?

assertions.name: yaml-template
assertions.description: Provides a complete, ready-to-use YAML front matter template

assertions.name: taxonomy-config
assertions.description: Shows how to configure difficulty, agent, and topic taxonomies

assertions.name: leaf-bundle-structure
assertions.description: Explains leaf bundles (index.md) for attaching resources (PDFs, code)

assertions.name: resource-access
assertions.description: Shows how to reference attached files in templates using .Resources
